Brightness transition duration.description: If you would like your lights brightness transitions to not be instantaneous you can set a specific speed in seconds here. The default is 0.

Do not use Hotspot addon as WiFi network.description: Advanced. Under development. The Hotspot offers a separate guest WiFi network for your smart devices. Using it will give you more insight into the communication habits of your Matter devices, and you can also block connections you don't want or trust.

Vendor ID.description: Advanced. You can manually set the Vendor ID of the Matter fabric. If you change this you will have to pair all your devices again. For example, the Home Assistant vendor ID is 134B

Thread dataset.description: Advanced. If you have an existing Thread code, then you can set it here. If you change this you my have to pair all your Matter Thread devices again.

Thread channel.description: Advanced. Which wireless channel the Thread network should use. Should be between (and including) 11 and 25, with 11, 15, 20 and 25 being common recommendations. Fun fact: Apple always uses 25. The default is 15.

Debugging.description: Advanced. Will generate details about the addon's processes in the internal log.
